label: Gold royalty / bullion sentiment

orientation.note: Bullion and miner sentiment are cyclical/gradual, not a single freezing transition.

interference.physics_note: Metal scarcity and royalty claims are physical/legal facts.
interference.economic_note: Royalty models remain viable across gold cycles; soft constraint is spot and volume.
interference.regulatory_note: Jurisdiction and mine permitting vary by asset; not a single US stimulus story.
interference.controlled_failures_note: Mine outages and one-period distribution dips are path noise for trusts.

reinforcement.recursive_note: No strong recursive self-acceleration like AI compute.

expected_value_note: Context for royalty sleeve sizing; gradual theme — fail gates matter less than phase-transition themes.
